# anypoint_exchange_asset (Data Source)

Reads a single Exchange asset. If `version` is omitted, the latest published version is returned.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up the latest version of an Exchange asset
data "anypoint_exchange_asset" "latest_petstore" {
  org_id   = var.org_id
  asset_id = "petstore"
}

# Look up a specific version
data "anypoint_exchange_asset" "v1_petstore" {
  org_id   = var.org_id
  asset_id = "petstore"
  version  = "1.0.0"
}

output "petstore_status" {
  value = data.anypoint_exchange_asset.latest_petstore.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asset_id` (String) The asset slug.
- `org_id` (String) The organization id that owns the asset.

### Optional

- `version` (String) The asset version. Omit to read the latest.

### Read-Only

- `attributes` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attributes))
- `categories` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--categories))
- `classifier` (String)
- `contact_email` (String)
- `contact_name` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by_id` (String)
- `custom_fields` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_fields))
- `dependencies_list` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dependencies_list))
- `description` (String)
- `group_id` (String) The business group id the asset belongs to.
- `id` (String) The composite id of this asset: org_id/group_id/asset_id/version.
- `is_public` (Boolean)
- `is_snapshot` (Boolean)
- `labels` (List of String)
- `minor_version` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization_id` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `version_group` (String)
- `versions` (List of String)

- `value` (String)
